name: Elmore Limited
summary: Elmore Limited engages in the assessment, development, and processing of minerals projects in Australia. The company explores for iron ore, magnetite, gold, copper, and cobalt deposits. It projects include Frances Creek project located in Northern Territory; and Peko Tails Project situated in the Tennant Creek region, Northern Territory. The company was formerly known as IndiOre Limited and changed its name to Elmore Limited in July 2019. Elmore Limited is headquartered in Perth, Australia.
